original_prompt: Better visual feedback for login errors and working admin password change.
rephrased_goal: Improve login error UI with animations and status messages; ensure admin password override works correctly in UsersView.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Add error message placeholder and shake animation CSS to index.html
subtasks_required: 1.1 Update CSS in index.html for .login-error and @keyframes shake

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update main.js login logic to show error message and shake card
subtasks_required: 3.2 Use login-error div instead of alert

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Fix User ID logic in view.users.js for password reset
subtasks_required: 5.1 Ensure user.user_id is used for password reset API call
5.2 Add loading state to password reset button
tasks.testing_criteria: Button has loading state, uses correct ID.

subtasks_required: Check server.js for any missing permissions
